title: Expose non-adequate concepts as a review frontier
problem: The merged graph stores adequacy signals but there was no command to list concepts that need one-layer expansion or clarification.
proposed_change: Add quiver tool frontier to list nodes whose adequacy is not adequate.
acceptance_criteria: AG95 pilot frontier lists needs_one_layer and unclear nodes for the next supervised extraction round.

history.note: Added tool frontier and CLI test coverage.
